titles.title: Crying Travailing (the Believers Song) / Come Take Us Home

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: So often I find myself slipping In little things, you may think it doesn't matter But when I come into His holy presence His life reveals my life and shows me where I'm wrong.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Crying, travailing, oh Lord hear our prayer, Crying, travailing, oh Lord come take us home.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: O, this life on earth is only a shadow. And the Bride of Christ is longing for the morning When the King of Kings is coming in power To see Him face to face, His glory will behold.
